You’ll also need to show evidence of any non-BN(O) dependants’ family links to you and you should travel together to the UK as a family unit. A dependant is any of the following:

-spouse or civil partner
-unmarried partner
-child (under the age of 18 when they first applied)
-other family members where they can show there is a high level of dependency

You’ll also need to show evidence of any non-BN(O) dependants’ family links to you and you should travel together to the UK as a family unit.

replies.msg:
第2點我自己就睇唔出
佢白紙黑字寫到明建議大家下年一月先apply

個人建議如果唔係有足夠金錢支撐
或者有急住走既需要
就唔好咁急住去
因為搵到工機會接近零
1. 而家隨時又lockdown 最易搵既服務業/sales 基本上都唔可能搵到
2. 你work visa得LOTR果半年 基本上HR都會question, 唔洗旨意班人會識bno, 就好似我地香港人都唔會識本地移民條例一樣

非撥冷水
一月先去就唔同講法 assume武肺好轉 自然工作機會多返好多
再加上bno visa一黎就會見到有五年
見工都易解釋好多
你係HR有咁多candidate揀 你都唔會揀個拎LOTR啦
